title: crataegus oxyacantha var. elegans
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. elegans, also known as the White Hawthorn tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species within the hawthorn family (Crataegus). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and is traditionally used to support heart health by improving blood flow and reducing blood pressure. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. elegans include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, lowering cholesterol levels, and improving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the tree, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
